localContext: North Merrick's residential neighborhoods, from the tree-lined streets near Merrick Road to homes near the North Merrick Community Park, feature the wood-frame construction that termites target. faqs.question: How much does termite treatment cost in North Merrick?
faqs.answer: Termite treatment in North Merrick typically ranges from $800 to $4,000, depending on your home's size, the extent of infestation, and treatment method required. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes with no hidden fees, ensuring you understand all costs before we begin work.

faqs.question: What types of termites are common in North Merrick?
faqs.answer: North Merrick primarily deals with Eastern subterranean termites, which live in soil and build mud tubes to access wood in homes. These termites are particularly active in spring and fall and can cause significant structural damage if left untreated. Our inspections identify the specific species and infestation severity.

faqs.question: How long does termite treatment take in North Merrick homes?
faqs.answer: Most termite treatments in North Merrick are completed in one day, typically taking 4-8 hours depending on your home's size and treatment method. Liquid barrier treatments and bait station installations can usually be done in a single visit, while monitoring and follow-up visits are scheduled as needed to ensure complete elimination.

faqs.question: Do you offer warranties on termite treatment in North Merrick?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide comprehensive warranties on our termite treatments in North Merrick, typically ranging from one to several years depending on the treatment plan selected. Our warranties include annual inspections and re-treatment if termites return during the coverage period, giving you long-term protection and peace of mind.
